name: Pecan Pie Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream the 1 cup softened butter with an electric mixer until fluffy.
3. Gradually drizzle in 1/2 cup of maple syrup, then add the salt.
4. Add flour gradually, about 1/2 cup at a time, until the dough is well combined but not too stiff.
5. If the mixture becomes too thick to beat with an electric mixer, switch to a wooden spoon.
6. Using floured hands, pat the soft dough evenly into a lightly greased baking pan measuring 8-inch by 12-inch.
7. Refrigerate while preparing the topping.
8. In a separate bowl, beat the egg for about 1 minute. Continue beating and add the remaining maple syrup, vanilla, melted butter, and the last tablespoon of flour until incorporated.
9. Stir in the chopped pecans.
10. Spread evenly over the shortbread layer.
11. Bake for approximately 40 minutes or until the top is set. Cool on a rack before cutting into bars.
